ham.subject: Scheduled Lync Platform Upgrade – November 15, 2025
ham.body:
Hello Team,

We will be performing a mandatory upgrade to the Lync collaboration platform on November 15, 2025 from 10:30 PM to 12:30 AM UTC.

During this window, you may experience brief disruptions to real‑time messaging and video conferencing. All features will be restored by 1:00 AM UTC.

If you have any questions or need assistance, please open a ticket in the IT Service Portal.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Your AWS Account will be Deactivated
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Our system has detected suspicious activity on your Amazon Web Services account. As a security measure, we have temporarily suspended all services. To restore your account, you must verify your identity within the next 2 hours.

Click the link below to complete the verification process:
<URL>

Failure to comply will result in permanent deletion of your account and all associated data.

Security Team
Amazon Web Services
